basic_details.job_title: SVNIRTAR Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Nurse, Special Educator and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Swami Vivekanand National Institute of Rehabilitation Training and Research (SVNIRTAR)
basic_details.short_information: The Swami Vivekanand National Institute of Rehabilitation Training and Research (SVNIRTAR) has released the official Consultant Notification 2026. A total of 7 vacancies have been announced under the SVNIRTAR Consultant Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with an age limit of maximum 56 years for most posts and 35 years for some Consultant posts and holding qualifications such as Bachelor Degree in Occupational Therapy, Bachelor's or Master's degree in Early Childhood Education/Special Education, Diploma in Special Education, Bachelor in Audiology, Speech & Language Pathology, Diploma in Gen

age_limit.age_details: Maximum age limit 56 years for most posts, 35 years for some consultant posts.
age_limit.details: Occupational Therapist (Consultant): Maximum age 56 years. Early Interventionist (Consultant): Maximum age 56 years. Special Educator (Mental Retardation/ Intellectual Disability) (Consultant): Maximum age 56 years. Special Educator (Visually Impaired) (Consultant): Maximum age 56 years. Audiologist and Speech Language Pathologist (ASLP) (Consultant): Maximum age 56 years. Nurse (Consultant): Maximum age 56 years. Age relaxation for PwD and Ex-Serviceman is as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor Degree in Occupational Therapy, Bachelor's or Master's degree in Early Childhood Education or Special Education, Diploma in Special Education, Bachelor in Audiology, Speech & Language Pathology, Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery or B.Sc. Nursing.
qualification.details: Occupational Therapist (Consultant): Bachelor Degree in Occupational Therapy from a recognized Institute. Minimum 2 years' experience. Early Interventionist (Consultant): Bachelor's or Master's degree in Early Childhood Education or Special Education. Minimum 2 years or 01 year experience respectively. RCI registration. Special Educator (Mental Retardation/ Intellectual Disability) (Consultant): Diploma in Special Education (Mental Retardation/ Intellectual disability) from recognized Institute with 4 years' experience. RCI registration. Special Educator (Visually Impaired) (Consultant): Diploma in Special Education (Visually Impaired) from recognized Institute with 4 years' experience. RCI registration. Audiologist and Speech Language Pathologist (ASLP) (Consultant): Bachelor in Audiology, Speech & Language Pathology (BASLP) from a recognized University with 2 years' experience. RCI registration. Nurse (Consultant): Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery or B.Sc. Nursing and registered with one of the State Nurse, registration councils in India. Minimum 2 years or 1 year experience respectively.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.35,000/- per month, Rs.30,000/- per month
salary_details.details: Remuneration for Occupational Therapist (Consultant): Rs.35,000/- per month Remuneration for Early Interventionist (Consultant): Rs.35,000/- per month Remuneration for Special Educator (Mental Retardation/ Intellectual Disability) (Consultant): Rs.35,000/- per month Remuneration for Special Educator (Visually Impaired) (Consultant): Rs.35,000/- per month Remuneration for Audiologist and Speech Language Pathologist (ASLP) (Consultant): Rs.35,000/- per month Remuneration for Nurse (Consultant): Rs.30,000/- per month Annual increment of 5% on basic remuneration payable to full-time/part time staff at CDEICs will be given on successful completion of one year.

selection_process: Personal Interviews Written examination (if more than 20 applications) Skill test (for technical posts)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the SVNIRTAR Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SVNIRTAR to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.swami_vivekanand_national_institute_of_r: Rs.35,000/- per month, Rs.30,000/- per month

Bachelor Degree in Occupational Therapy, Bachelor's or Master's degree in Early Childhood Education or Special Education, Diploma in Special Education, Bachelor in Audiology, Speech & Language Pathology, Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery or B.Sc. Nursing.
Maximum age limit 56 years for most posts, 35 years for some consultant posts.

content_sections.heading: SVNIRTAR Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download SVNIRTAR Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Occupational Therapist (Consultant): Bachelor Degree in Occupational Therapy from a recognized Institute. Minimum 2 years' experience. Early Interventionist (Consultant): Bachelor's or Master's degree in Early Childhood Education or Special Education. Minimum 2 years or 01 year experience respectively. RCI registration. Special Educator (Mental Retardation/ Intellectual Disability) (Consultant): Diploma in Special Education (Mental Retardation/ Intellectual disability) from recognized Institute with 4 years' experience. RCI registration. Special Educator (Visually Impaired) (Consultant): Diploma in Special Education (Visually Impaired) from recognized Institute with 4 years' experience. RCI registration. Audiologist and Speech Language Pathologist (ASLP) (Consultant): Bachelor in Audiology, Speech & Language Pathology (BASLP) from a recognized University with 2 years' experience. RCI registration. Nurse (Consultant): Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery or B.Sc. Nursing and registered with one of the State Nurse, registration councils in India. Minimum 2 years or 1 year experience respectively.

content_sections.heading: SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Occupational Therapist (Consultant): Maximum age 56 years. Early Interventionist (Consultant): Maximum age 56 years. Special Educator (Mental Retardation/ Intellectual Disability) (Consultant): Maximum age 56 years. Special Educator (Visually Impaired) (Consultant): Maximum age 56 years. Audiologist and Speech Language Pathologist (ASLP) (Consultant): Maximum age 56 years. Nurse (Consultant): Maximum age 56 years. Age relaxation for PwD and Ex-Serviceman is as per rules.

content_sections.heading: SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026 - Salary Details
content_sections.text: Remuneration for Occupational Therapist (Consultant): Rs.35,000/- per month Remuneration for Early Interventionist (Consultant): Rs.35,000/- per month Remuneration for Special Educator (Mental Retardation/ Intellectual Disability) (Consultant): Rs.35,000/- per month Remuneration for Special Educator (Visually Impaired) (Consultant): Rs.35,000/- per month Remuneration for Audiologist and Speech Language Pathologist (ASLP) (Consultant): Rs.35,000/- per month Remuneration for Nurse (Consultant): Rs.30,000/- per month Annual increment of 5% on basic remuneration payable to full-time/part time staff at CDEICs will be given on successful completion of one year.

rows.event: Last date of submission of online application
Last date for receipt of hard copy of application

content_sections.heading: SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Personal Interviews Written examination (if more than 20 applications) Skill test (for technical posts)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the SVNIRTAR Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SVNIRTAR to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the online application for SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026 is 24th August 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Consultant posts at SVNIRTAR?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for Consultant posts at Swami Vivekanand National Institute of Rehabilitation Training and Research (SVNIRTAR) as per the latest recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification varies by post. It ranges from a Diploma in Special Education to a Bachelor's Degree in Occupational Therapy, Early Childhood Education, Special Education, Audiology, Speech & Language Pathology, or B.Sc. Nursing.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to SVNIRTAR Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for most Consultant posts is 56 years. However, for some specific consultant roles, the age limit might be 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC/EWS candidates is Rs. 500/-, for SC/ST candidates it is Rs. 250/-, and PwD candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The salary for most Consultant posts is Rs. 35,000/- per month. For the Nurse (Consultant) post, the salary is Rs. 30,000/- per month. An annual increment of 5% is also provided.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for SVNIRTAR Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily includes Personal Interviews. A written examination may be conducted if more than 20 applications are received for a post, and a skill test might be held for technical positions.

faq.question: Q8. Is the application process online or offline?
faq.answer: The application process is primarily online. Candidates need to apply through the official website. However, a hard copy of the application along with documents must be sent via Speed Post/Registered Post.

faq.question: Q9. Where is SVNIRTAR located?
faq.answer: Swami Vivekanand National Institute of Rehabilitation Training and Research (SVNIRTAR) is located in Olatpur, Post: Bairoi, Dist.: Cuttack, Odisha, PIN: 754010.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these Consultant positions?
faq.answer: The Consultant positions at SVNIRTAR are on a contract basis.

faq.answer: The last date for submission of the online application for SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026 is 24th August 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.
